column6: Default administrative accounts (sa) enabled on production SQL servers with weak password policy. No multifactor authentication configured for DBA access.
column9: No mandatory password rotation policy for service accounts and absence of MFA framework for privileged database access.
column11: Implemented mandatory password rotation (90 days) for all DB service accounts. Deployed MFA for all DBA logins via Azure AD PIM.
column15: Root cause addressed via policy change ISMS-POL-042

column6: Unencrypted backup files stored on network share accessible to non-DBA staff (share read permissions granted to Domain Users group).
column9: No data classification applied to backup media and lack of access control review for shared storage.
column11: Restrict NTFS permissions to DBA team only. Implement backup encryption using AES-256. Conduct quarterly shared-permission reviews.
column15: Escalated to CISO for review. Dependent on storage migration project.

column6: Audit logging not enabled for failed login attempts on three Oracle database instances used for core banking.
column9: Database audit trail configuration was not included in the baseline hardening checklist.
column11: Enabled unified audit trail for all Oracle instances. Updated database hardening standard (STD-DB-012).
column15: Root cause addressed via hardening standard update

column6: No database activity monitoring (DAM) solution deployed to detect anomalous SQL queries in real time.
column9: Budget approval for DAM procurement delayed due to Q1-Q2 spending freeze. Tool evaluation not initiated.
column11: Complete vendor evaluation by May 2024. Procure and deploy DAM solution. Integrate with existing SIEM.
column15: Deferred per CFO directive. Risk acceptance note filed (RAN-2024-003).

column6: Test database instances not isolated from production environments. Two test DBs sharing network segment with production.
column9: DevOps environment provisioning process did not mandate network segmentation for non-production databases.
column11: Provisioned isolated VLAN (VLAN-120) for test databases. Updated infrastructure-as-code templates with mandatory segmentation.
column15: Root cause addressed via IaC template update

column6: Centralized IT asset inventory does not include software license details or cloud subscription metadata for 340+ SaaS applications.
column9: No Board-approved IT Asset Management policy existed at time of audit. Inventory scope not defined.
column11: Draft and obtain Board approval for IT Asset Management policy. Complete asset inventory enrichment for all software and cloud assets.
column15: Policy approval pending at Board Audit Committee meeting scheduled 15-Jul-2024

column6: Twelve end-of-life Windows Server 2012 R2 systems supporting payment gateway infrastructure are still in production without an approved upgrade or replacement plan.
column9: Business continuity risk acceptance process bypassed. No EOL/EOS governance framework in place.
column11: Develop EOL/EOS management policy. Create migration plan for each EOL system with timeline. Obtain risk acceptance from CRO for interim period.
column15: Risk acceptance filed (RAN-2024-007). Migration vendor engaged.

column6: Asset inventory version-control history not captured. Unable to verify who approved asset additions/deletions between January and April 2024.
column9: Asset inventory managed via static spreadsheet without versioning or approver workflow.
column11: Implement CMDB with change-log and approver workflow. Define reviewer/approver matrix for asset lifecycle events.

column6: Asset tags (barcodes) not affixed on 45 desktops deployed in three remote branch offices.
column9: Branch asset onboarding checklist did not include asset-tagging step. No verification gate.
column11: Asset tagging completed for all 45 desktops. Updated branch onboarding SOP (SOP-BR-009) to include tagging verification.
column15: Root cause addressed via SOP update

column6: No documented decommissioning procedure for retired hardware. Retired servers stored in datacenter loading bay without sanitization certificate.
column9: Asset disposal policy and procedure not defined. No data sanitization verification process.
column11: Draft IT Asset Disposal SOP. Conduct data sanitization for all retired assets. Issue certificate of destruction.
